analyst_briefing: No changes recommended to preliminary attribution confidences for three ongoing campaigns: Doppelganger (RU, Confirmed), Endless Mayfly/IUVM (IR, High), and Portal Kombat (RU, High). All marked as explicit continuations of prior baselines with Tier 1 evidence (Meta/Google TAG), though MF2/MF3 flags note lack of this-week corroboration. Actor postures stable at HIGHLY ACTIVE (RU/CN) and ACTIVE (IR), but notable absence of new disclosures across actors suggests reporting cadence gaps rather than operational shifts. Linkages confirmed as continuations via matching actor/TTPs. Escalation flags raised to ESA (Doppelganger EU targeting), SCEM (Portal Kombat hybrid patterns), and AGM (RU AI content). No contested findings or daily candidates require review. Prioritize verification of ongoing infrastructure activity.
